race.comment: LUCKY SINGLE (7) debuts and has impressed when winning both of her recent jumpouts. Looks good enough to manage the awkward gate, and on what we've seen, she will be tough to beat. SPARKLING AWARD (11) resumes for a top stable and brings two wins from the Pakenham jumpouts. Has the inside gate, and she's set to show a lot more than she did in her brief maiden preparation. WANTED ENUFF (14) made a strong impression, placing on a slow track at Kyneton on debut. Raced new in the straight and offered little on a firm surface at Swan Hill following, as a $9 pop. Better for that and draws low with a winkers off. No surprise to see her back on track. ASTROPARTICAL (1) debuts for a top stable and placed at Cranbourne in her latest jumpout. The betting will be key with her. MISS DECEIVER (8) is one of the best chances if she presents on a 4-day return.
